# Dependencies

<!-- Generated by /ai-context. Manual edits are overwritten on re-run. -->

## AS IS — Current state

### External services

| Service | Purpose | How wired |
|---------|---------|-----------|
| Windows OS proxy subsystem | System-wide HTTPS traffic routed through local proxy | `ProxyServer.SetAsSystemProxy(_endpoint, ProxyProtocolType.AllHttp)` in `ProxyService.StartAsync` (`Services/ProxyService.cs:46`) |
| Windows certificate store (implicit) | `X509Certificate2` loaded from PFX bytes in memory | `new X509Certificate2(pfxBytes, password, X509KeyStorageFlags.EphemeralKeySet)` in `CertBrokerService.LoadFromPfxBytes` (`Services/CertBrokerService.cs:41-44`) |

### Internal libraries

No private/first-party NuGet packages. All code lives within the single `CertGuardMini` project.

### Shared infrastructure

| Component | Role | Implementation |
|-----------|------|----------------|
| Titanium.Web.Proxy 3.2.0 | HTTPS MITM proxy engine | `ProxyServer` instance in `ProxyService` — handles TLS termination, request interception, client certificate injection, root CA certificate installation |
| GitHub Actions CI | Build + publish pipeline | `.github/workflows/build.yml` — manual trigger, `windows-latest`, restores → builds Release → publishes self-contained win-x64 → uploads artifact with 30-day retention |

No queues, caches, databases, message brokers, or observability infrastructure. The application is a self-contained desktop prototype with a single NuGet dependency.
